overrides.new: C the straight-line segment from 0 to 1 + i, Fig. 344.
overrides.reason: Raw PDF page 677 prints 'C the straight-line segment from 0 to 1 + i, Fig. 344.' The parsed text dropped '1 + i' and fused the trailing punctuation into a bogus 'Fig. 344.1' reference, which created a false missing-figure audit finding.
